heading: Learn by Watching
body:
Follow along with this video to learn about how you can create and use a
numeric and string [faceted navigation](fts-facet-ref) in your query to group results
and retrieve a count of the results in the groups.

*Duration: 11 Minutes*

[https://youtu.be/90icEZ8fzJE](https://youtu.be/90icEZ8fzJE)
